## What layout bug should be detected?

Describe the CSS / layout problem that layout-canary currently misses.

## Why is this hard to catch manually?

Explain why developers miss this bug and why a runtime detector is valuable.

## Example of the broken layout

```html
<!-- HTML/CSS that demonstrates the issue -->
```

## Proposed detection approach

If you have ideas on how to detect this programmatically (getBoundingClientRect, getComputedStyle, etc.), share them here.

## Alternatives considered

Any other tools or approaches you've looked at.
